text: The burden<S>4853</S> which Habakkuk<S>2265</S> the prophet<S>5030</S> did see<S>2372</S>.
O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, how long shall I cry<S>7768</S>, and thou wilt not hear<S>8085</S>? I cry out<S>2199</S> unto thee of violence<S>2555</S>, and thou wilt not save<S>3467</S>.

Why dost thou show<S>7200</S> me iniquity<S>205</S>, and look<S>5027</S> upon perverseness<S>5999</S>? for destruction<S>7701</S> and violence<S>2555</S> are before me<S>7379</S>; and there is strife, and contention<S>4066</S> riseth up<S>5375</S>.

Therefore the law<S>8451</S> is slacked<S>6313</S>, and justice<S>4941</S> doth never<S>5331</S> go forth<S>3318</S>; for the wicked<S>7563</S> doth compass<S>3803</S> about the righteous<S>6662</S>; therefore justice<S>4941</S> goeth forth<S>3318</S> perverted<S>6127</S>.

Behold<S>7200</S> ye among the nations<S>1471</S>, and look<S>5027</S>, and wonder<S>8539</S> marvellously<S>8539</S>; for I am working<S>6466</S> a work<S>6467</S> in your days<S>3117</S>, which ye will not believe<S>539</S> though it be told you<S>5608</S>.

For<S>6965</S>, lo, I raise up the Chaldeans<S>3778</S>, that bitter<S>4751</S> and hasty<S>4116</S> nation<S>1471</S>, that march<S>1980</S> through the breadth<S>4800</S> of the earth<S>776</S>, to possess<S>3423</S> dwelling-places<S>4908</S> that are not theirs.
They are terrible<S>366</S> and dreadful<S>3372</S>; their judgment<S>4941</S> and their dignity<S>7613</S> proceed from themselves<S>3318</S>.

Their horses<S>5483</S> also are swifter<S>7043</S> than leopards<S>5246</S>, and are more fierce<S>2300</S> than the evening<S>6153</S> wolves<S>2061</S>; and their horsemen<S>6571</S> press proudly<S>6335</S> on<S>6571</S>: yea, their horsemen come<S>935</S> from far<S>7350</S>; they fly<S>5774</S> as an eagle<S>5404</S> that hasteth<S>2363</S> to devour<S>398</S>.
They come<S>935</S> all of them for violence<S>2555</S>; the set<S>4041</S> of their faces<S>6440</S> is forwards<S>6921</S>; and they gather<S>622</S> captives<S>7628</S> as the sand<S>2344</S>.

Yea<S>7046</S>, he scoffeth at kings<S>4428</S>, and princes<S>7336</S> are a derision<S>4890</S> unto him<S>7832</S>; he derideth every stronghold<S>4013</S>; for he heapeth<S>6651</S> up dust<S>6083</S>, and taketh it<S>3920</S>.
Then shall he sweep<S>2498</S> by as a wind<S>7307</S>, and shall pass over<S>5674</S>, and be guilty<S>816</S>, even he whose<S>2098</S> might<S>3581</S> is his god<S>433</S>.

Art not thou from everlasting<S>6924</S>, O Jehovah<S>3068</S> my God<S>430</S>, my Holy One<S>6918</S>? we shall not die<S>4191</S>. O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, thou hast ordained<S>7760</S> him for judgment<S>4941</S>; and thou<S>6697</S>, O Rock, hast established<S>3245</S> him for correction<S>3198</S>.

Thou that art of purer<S>2889</S> eyes<S>5869</S> than to behold<S>7200</S> evil<S>7451</S>, and that canst<S>3201</S> not look<S>5027</S> on perverseness<S>5999</S>, wherefore lookest<S>5027</S> thou upon them that deal treacherously<S>898</S>, and holdest thy peace<S>2790</S> when the wicked<S>7563</S> swalloweth<S>1104</S> up the man that is more righteous than he<S>6662</S>;
and makest<S>6213</S> men<S>120</S> as the fishes<S>1709</S> of the sea<S>3220</S>, as the creeping things<S>7431</S>, that have no ruler over them<S>4910</S>?

He taketh up<S>5927</S> all of them with the angle<S>2443</S>, he catcheth<S>1641</S> them in his net<S>2764</S>, and gathereth<S>622</S> them in his drag<S>4365</S>: therefore he rejoiceth<S>8055</S> and is glad<S>1523</S>.

Therefore he sacrificeth<S>2076</S> unto his net<S>2764</S>, and burneth incense<S>6999</S> unto his drag<S>4365</S>; because by them<S>1992</S> his portion<S>2506</S> is fat<S>8082</S>, and his food<S>3978</S> plenteous<S>1277</S>.
Shall he therefore empty<S>7324</S> his net<S>2764</S>, and spare<S>2550</S> not to slay<S>2026</S> the nations<S>1471</S> continually<S>8548</S>?

I will stand<S>5975</S> upon my watch<S>4931</S>, and set<S>3320</S> me upon the tower<S>4692</S>, and will look<S>7200</S> forth to see<S>7200</S> what he will speak<S>1696</S> with me<S>7725</S>, and what I shall answer concerning my complaint<S>8433</S>.

And Jehovah<S>3068</S> answered<S>6030</S> me<S>559</S>, and said, Write<S>3789</S> the vision<S>2377</S>, and make it plain<S>874</S> upon tablets<S>3871</S>, that he may run<S>7323</S> that readeth it<S>7121</S>.

For the vision<S>2377</S> is yet for the appointed time<S>4150</S>, and it hasteth toward the end<S>7093</S>, and shall<S>6315</S> not lie<S>3576</S>: though it tarry<S>4102</S>, wait<S>2442</S> for it<S>935</S>; because it will surely come<S>935</S>, it will not delay<S>309</S>.
Behold<S>5315</S>, his soul is puffed up<S>6075</S>, it is not upright<S>3474</S> in him<S>6662</S>; but the righteous shall live<S>2421</S> by his faith<S>530</S>.

Yea<S>3196</S>, moreover, wine is treacherous<S>898</S>, a haughty<S>3093</S> man<S>1397</S>, that keepeth not at home<S>5115</S>; who enlargeth<S>7337</S> his desire<S>5315</S> as Sheol<S>7585</S>, and he is as death<S>4194</S>, and cannot be satisfied<S>7646</S>, but gathereth<S>622</S> unto him all nations<S>1471</S>, and heapeth<S>6908</S> unto him all peoples<S>5971</S>.

Shall not all these take up<S>5375</S> a parable<S>4912</S> against him<S>4426</S>, and a taunting proverb<S>2420</S> against him<S>559</S>, and say, Woe<S>1945</S> to him that increaseth<S>7235</S> that which is not his<S>3513</S>! how long? and that ladeth himself with pledges<S>5671</S>!
Shall they not rise up<S>6965</S> suddenly<S>6621</S> that shall bite<S>5391</S> thee<S>3364</S>, and awake that shall vex<S>2111</S> thee<S>4933</S>, and thou shalt be for booty unto them?

Because thou hast plundered<S>7997</S> many<S>7227</S> nations<S>1471</S>, all the remnant<S>3499</S> of the peoples<S>5971</S> shall plunder<S>7997</S> thee<S>120</S>, because of men's blood<S>1818</S>, and for the violence<S>2555</S> done to the land<S>776</S>, to the city<S>7151</S> and to all that dwell therein<S>3427</S>.

Woe<S>1945</S> to him that getteth<S>1214</S> an evil<S>7451</S> gain<S>1215</S> for his house<S>1004</S>, that he may set<S>7760</S> his nest<S>7064</S> on high<S>4791</S>, that he may be delivered<S>5337</S> from the hand<S>3709</S> of evil<S>7451</S>!
Thou hast devised<S>3289</S> shame<S>1322</S> to thy house<S>1004</S>, by cutting off<S>7096</S> many<S>7227</S> peoples<S>5971</S>, and hast sinned<S>2398</S> against thy soul<S>5315</S>.
For the stone<S>68</S> shall cry out<S>2199</S> of the wall<S>7023</S>, and the beam out<S>3714</S> of the timber<S>6086</S> shall answer it<S>6030</S>.
Woe<S>1945</S> to him that buildeth<S>1129</S> a town<S>5892</S> with blood<S>1818</S>, and establisheth<S>3559</S> a city<S>7151</S> by iniquity<S>5766</S>!

Behold<S>3068</S>, is it not of Jehovah of hosts<S>6635</S> that the peoples<S>5971</S> labor<S>3021</S> for the<S>1767</S> fire<S>784</S>, and the nations<S>3816</S> weary<S>3286</S> themselves for<S>1767</S> vanity<S>7385</S>?
For the earth<S>776</S> shall be filled<S>4390</S> with the knowledge<S>3045</S> of the glory<S>3519</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, as the waters<S>4325</S> cover<S>3680</S> the sea<S>3220</S>.

Woe<S>1945</S> unto him that giveth his neighbor<S>7453</S> drink<S>8248</S>, to thee that addest<S>5596</S> thy venom<S>2573</S>, and makest him drunken<S>7937</S> also<S>5027</S>, that thou mayest look on their nakedness<S>4589</S>!

Thou art filled<S>7646</S> with shame<S>7036</S>, and not glory<S>3519</S>: drink<S>8354</S> thou also<S>6188</S>, and be as one uncircumcised; the cup<S>3563</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s right hand<S>3225</S> shall come round<S>5437</S> unto thee<S>7022</S>, and foul shame shall be upon thy glory<S>3519</S>.

For the violence<S>2555</S> done to Lebanon<S>3844</S> shall cover<S>3680</S> thee<S>7701</S>, and the destruction of the beasts<S>929</S>, which made them afraid<S>2865</S>; because of men<S>120</S>'s blood<S>1818</S>, and for the violence<S>2555</S> done to the land<S>776</S>, to the city<S>7151</S> and to all that dwell therein<S>3427</S>.

What profiteth<S>3276</S> the graven image<S>6459</S>, that the maker<S>3335</S> thereof hath graven<S>6458</S> it<S>4541</S>; the molten image, even the teacher<S>3384</S> of lies<S>8267</S>, that he that fashioneth<S>3335</S> its form<S>3336</S> trusteth<S>982</S> therein<S>6213</S>, to make dumb<S>483</S> idols<S>457</S>?

Woe<S>1945</S> unto him that saith<S>559</S> to the wood<S>6086</S>, Awake<S>6974</S>; to the dumb<S>1748</S> stone<S>68</S>, Arise<S>5782</S>! Shall this teach<S>3384</S>? Behold<S>8610</S>, it is overlaid with gold<S>2091</S> and silver<S>3701</S>, and there is no breath<S>7307</S> at all in the midst of it<S>7130</S>.
But Jehovah<S>3068</S> is in his holy<S>6944</S> temple<S>1964</S>: let all the earth<S>776</S> keep silence<S>2013</S> before him<S>6440</S>.
A prayer<S>8605</S> of Habakkuk<S>2265</S> the prophet<S>5030</S>, set to Shigionoth<S>7692</S>.

O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, I have heard<S>8085</S> the report<S>8088</S> of thee<S>3372</S>, and am afraid: O Jehovah<S>3068</S>, revive<S>2421</S> thy work<S>6467</S> in the midst<S>7130</S> of the years<S>8141</S>; In the midst<S>7130</S> of the years<S>8141</S> make it known<S>3045</S>; In wrath<S>7267</S> remember<S>2142</S> mercy<S>7355</S>.

God<S>433</S> came<S>935</S> from Teman<S>8487</S>, And the Holy One<S>6918</S> from mount<S>2022</S> Paran<S>6290</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>. His glory<S>1935</S> covered<S>3680</S> the heavens<S>8064</S>, And the earth<S>776</S> was full<S>4390</S> of his praise<S>8416</S>.
And his brightness<S>5051</S> was as the light<S>216</S>; He had rays<S>7161</S> coming forth from his hand<S>3027</S>; And there was the hiding<S>2253</S> of his power<S>5797</S>.
Before<S>6440</S> him went<S>3212</S> the pestilence<S>1698</S>, And fiery bolts<S>7565</S> went forth<S>3318</S> at his feet<S>7272</S>.

He stood<S>5975</S>, and measured<S>4128</S> the earth<S>776</S>; He beheld<S>7200</S>, and drove asunder<S>5425</S> the nations<S>1471</S>; And the eternal<S>5703</S> mountains<S>2042</S> were scattered<S>6327</S>; The everlasting<S>5703</S> hills<S>1389</S> did bow<S>7817</S>; His goings<S>5769</S> were as of old<S>5769</S>.
I saw<S>7200</S> the tents<S>168</S> of Cushan<S>3572</S> in affliction<S>205</S>; The curtains<S>3407</S> of the land<S>776</S> of Midian<S>4080</S> did tremble<S>7264</S>.

Was Jehovah<S>3068</S> displeased<S>2734</S> with the rivers<S>5104</S>? Was thine anger<S>639</S> against the rivers<S>5104</S>, Or thy wrath<S>5678</S> against the sea<S>3220</S>, That thou didst ride<S>7392</S> upon thy horses<S>5483</S>, Upon thy chariots<S>4818</S> of salvation<S>3444</S>?

Thy bow<S>7198</S> was made quite<S>6181</S> bare<S>5783</S>; The oaths<S>7621</S> to the tribes<S>4294</S> were a sure word<S>562</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>. Thou didst cleave<S>1234</S> the earth<S>776</S> with rivers<S>5104</S>.

The mountains<S>2022</S> saw<S>7200</S> thee<S>2342</S>, and were afraid; The tempest<S>2230</S> of waters<S>4325</S> passed by<S>5674</S>; The deep<S>8415</S> uttered<S>5414</S> its voice<S>6963</S>, And lifted up<S>5375</S> its hands<S>3027</S> on high<S>7315</S>.

The sun<S>8121</S> and moon<S>3394</S> stood still<S>5975</S> in their habitation<S>2073</S>, At the light<S>216</S> of thine arrows<S>2671</S> as they went<S>1980</S>, At the shining<S>5051</S> of thy glittering<S>1300</S> spear<S>2595</S>.
Thou didst march through<S>6805</S> the land<S>776</S> in indignation<S>2195</S>; Thou didst thresh<S>1758</S> the nations<S>1471</S> in anger<S>639</S>.

Thou wentest forth<S>3318</S> for the salvation<S>3468</S> of thy people<S>5971</S>, For the salvation<S>3468</S> of thine anointed<S>4899</S>; Thou woundest<S>4272</S> the head<S>7218</S> out of the house<S>1004</S> of the wicked<S>7563</S> man<S>6168</S>, Laying bare the foundation<S>3247</S> even unto the neck<S>6677</S>. Selah<S>5542</S>.

Thou didst pierce<S>5344</S> with his own staves<S>4294</S> the head<S>7218</S> of his warriors<S>6518</S>: They came as a whirlwind<S>5590</S> to scatter<S>6327</S> me<S>5951</S>; Their rejoicing was as to devour<S>398</S> the poor<S>6041</S> secretly<S>4565</S>.
Thou didst tread<S>1869</S> the sea<S>3220</S> with thy horses<S>5483</S>, The heap<S>2563</S> of mighty<S>7227</S> waters<S>4325</S>.

I heard<S>8085</S>, and my body<S>990</S> trembled<S>7264</S>, My lips<S>8193</S> quivered<S>6750</S> at the voice<S>6963</S>; Rottenness<S>7538</S> entereth<S>935</S> into my bones<S>6106</S>, and I tremble<S>7264</S> in my place<S>5117</S>; Because I must wait quietly for the day<S>3117</S> of trouble<S>6869</S>, For the coming up<S>5927</S> of the people<S>5971</S> that invadeth us<S>1464</S>.

For though the fig-tree<S>8384</S> shall not flourish<S>6524</S>, Neither shall fruit<S>2981</S> be in the vines<S>1612</S>; The labor<S>4639</S> of the olive<S>2132</S> shall fail<S>3584</S>, And the fields<S>7709</S> shall yield<S>6213</S> no food<S>400</S>; The flock<S>6629</S> shall be cut off<S>1504</S> from the fold<S>4356</S>, And there shall be no herd<S>1241</S> in the stalls<S>7517</S>:
Yet I will rejoice<S>5937</S> in Jehovah<S>3068</S>, I will joy<S>1523</S> in the God<S>430</S> of my salvation<S>3468</S>.

Jehovah<S>3069</S>, the Lord<S>136</S>, is my strength<S>2428</S>; And he maketh<S>7760</S> my feet<S>7272</S> like hinds<S>355</S>' feet<S>1869</S>, And will make me to walk upon my high places<S>1116</S>.
